articles.headline: Eagles Win Super Bowl LX in Dominant Fashion
articles.summary: The Philadelphia Eagles captured their second Super Bowl title with a commanding 38-17 victory over the Kansas City Chiefs.
articles.author: Marcus Hayes

articles.headline: SEPTA Faces $240M Budget Shortfall, Service Cuts Loom
articles.summary: Regional transit authority warns of significant service reductions without new state funding by fiscal year end.
articles.author: Paul Nussbaum
